facts_disclosed: Megan broke up with him — now dating Kayla the nurse at Mass General

turns.content: settle a debate for me bro whats a good date spot in boston thats not super fancy but also not like a dive bar

Good question -- Boston's got a lot of solid in-between spots. A few ideas:

- **Time Out Market** in the Fenway area -- it's a food hall so there's a bunch of different options, casual but still feels like you put thought into it.
- **Night Shift Brewing** in the Seaport -- great beer, chill vibe, some food options.
- **Lolita Cocina & Tequila Bar** in Back Bay -- a step above a dive but not stuffy at all, fun atmosphere.

What kind of vibe are you going for? First date or been together a while?

its still kinda new so like maybe our 4th or 5th time hangin out. this girl kayla I been seein shes a nurse at mass general so shes always workin crazy hours and we finally got a night where were both free

Oh nice, nurses have the wildest schedules so I get that. For a 4th-5th date with matching nights off, I'd lean toward Time Out Market or somewhere with a similar vibe -- you can walk around, try different foods, keeps the conversation flowing naturally. Plus it's in Fenway so you can take a walk around the area after.

What kind of food does she like?
shes into like sushi and japanese food. I could do sushi I aint picky about anything

If she's into Japanese food, check out **Douzo** on Dartmouth Street -- solid sushi spot that's nice without being over the top. Or **Cafe Sushi** in Cambridge if you don't mind the drive. Douzo is probably the move though -- cool atmosphere, legit sushi, and it hits that sweet spot of not too casual, not too fancy.
douzo sounds perfect thats exactly what im lookin for. how much we talkin for two people tho like am I droppin 200 bucks here

Nah, you should be fine. For two people with a couple rolls each, maybe some appetizers and drinks, you're probably looking at $80-120 depending on how much you order. It's not cheap cheap, but it's way under $200 unless you go crazy with the sushi. Definitely manageable for a date night.
ok thats not bad. she works like 12 hour shifts at the hospital so I dont wanna take her somewhere thats gonna be a whole production you know just wanna chill and have some good food

Douzo is perfect for that then. Relaxed enough that you can settle in without any pressure. They have a solid sake menu too if you're into that. I'd make a reservation though, especially if it's a Friday or Saturday -- it can get busy.
good call ill do that. yeah im kinda nervous honestly cuz me and megan ended a while back and I havent really taken anybody out since then so im a little rusty at the whole date thing lol

That's totally normal coming out of a relationship. But honestly, the fact that you're putting this much thought into it already puts you ahead. By date 4 or 5, things should be comfortable enough that you can just be yourself. Don't overthink it.
yeah youre right I just gotta chill. kaylas really easy to talk to honestly so its not like theres awkward silences or anything we always end up talkin for like hours when we hang out

That's a great sign. If the conversation flows that naturally, you're already in good shape. The restaurant is just the setting -- the connection is what matters, and it sounds like you two already have that.
yeah no shes wicked cool. shes from the area too which is nice and she actually thinks its cool that I work with my hands like she doesnt look down on it at all which is huge for me
Someone who respects what you do and vibes with you naturally -- that's what matters. And being from the area means you probably already have a lot in common. Sounds like a solid match.
yeah im feelin good about it man not tryna get ahead of myself tho just takin it easy and seein where it goes. should I bring flowers or is that too much for like a 5th date

I'd skip the flowers for a sushi dinner -- it's a bit much and then she has to carry them around all night. Save that for picking her up at her place or a more special occasion. Just dress well, be on time, and be yourself. That's more than enough.
facts ok no flowers just show up and dont be weird got it lol. thanks for the help bro im gonna look up douzo right now and get a reservation
Ha, that's the gameplan. Douzo, good sushi, chill vibes. She's going to have a great time. Good luck, enjoy the night!
